title: Taming Frizzy Hair: 9 Herbal Teas for Curly Hair Owners
description: Equisetum arvense tinctures can be beneficial for frizzy hair due to its properties and constituents. The plant contains silica, a natural mineral that helps strengthen and smooth hair cuticles, reducing frizz and flyaways. It also contains saponins and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, promoting healthy hair growth and scalp balance.
